title: Add proven HAL reset-cause clear support
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1 exposes reset-cause read diagnostics, but Zephyr does not provide a non-destructive clear-support probe separate from hwinfo_clear_reset_cause(), so the initial HAL slice keeps reset-cause clearing unsupported instead of advertising unsupported/unproven behavior. What needs to be done: design a HAL-owned policy for reset-cause clear support, prove backend support without destructive snapshot side effects, add native_sim/qemu tests or backend-specific fixtures, and split physical target validation if required.
close_reason: Future work - HAL reset-cause clear support deferred to hardware validation phase
